## Outcome

<!-- What becomes possible after this change? -->

## Learning behavior

<!-- What must the learner understand, decide, build, or demonstrate? -->

## Evidence

- [ ] Unit or contract tests added or updated
- [ ] Production build passes
- [ ] Playwright coverage added or updated when learner behavior changes
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings attached for meaningful visual changes

## Validation performed

```text
npm run test:unit
npm run build
npm run test:games
```

<!-- Remove commands that were not required and explain any check that was not run. -->

## Accessibility

- [ ] Required interactions work with keyboard input
- [ ] Feedback is perceivable without relying only on color
- [ ] Focus, labels, and status announcements remain understandable

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No secrets, real child data, or private educational records are included
- [ ] Data collection or external-service changes are documented
- [ ] The change does not claim validated educational efficacy without evidence
